# Grass Monkey Landscaping

> The most dependable weekly lawn maintenance crew in Muskogee, OK.

## Business Core
- **Tagline**: We show up. Every single week.
- **Service Type**: Weekly Residential Mowing & Commercial Property Maintenance.
- **Location**: Muskogee, Oklahoma (Serving Green Country).
- **Phone**: (918) 348-1663
- **Hours**: Mon-Fri 8:00 AM - 6:00 PM.

## Core Services
- **Lawn Mowing**: Weekly routes, includes trimming/edging/blowing.
- **Commercial Property Care**: Professional clinics, HOAs, retail storefronts.
- **Mulching & Bed Care**: Seasonal refreshing and landscaping resets.
- **Seasonal Cleanups**: Leaf removal and property prep.

## Reliable Tech
- **Secure Billing**: Pay via card through client portal.
- **Communication**: Automated text alerts when crew is en route.
- **Proof of Quality**: Digital property reports for every visit.

## Commercial Inquiries
- W-9 Compliant.
- Fully Insured.
- Net-30 Invoicing available for qualified properties.
